core_principles: Tactical Minimalism: Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights.
High Visibility: Use Deep Obsidian as the primary anchor, Pure White for data clarity, and Electric Blaze as the kinetic trigger.
Command Center Feel: Dense data presentation optimized for quick scanning in active environments.
Motion & Interactivity: Meaningful feedback with controlled brightness. Fluid, subtle microinteractions to avoid harsh flashes.

fonts.heading: Barlow Condensed, Bebas Neue, or Oswald (Strong Condensed Sans)
fonts.body: DM Sans, Inter, or Roboto (Geometric Sans)
fonts.mono: JetBrains Mono or Roboto Mono (for metrics and data)

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-black uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold uppercase tracking-tight leading-tight

grid_strategy.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4. Every pixel utilized, no jagged bottoms.
grid_strategy.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 gap-8 with offset alignment and asymmetry.

cards.style: Flat background (surface), 1px subtle border (border-default), no soft drop shadows.
cards.hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color shifts to border-focus, subtle glow box-shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-md px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-border text-white hover:border-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-md px-6 py-3

inputs.style: bg-surface-elevated border border-border text-white px-4 py-3 rounded-md placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary

navigation.mobile: Bottom tab bar with sharp active state indicators (1px red line above active icon).
navigation.desktop: Left sidebar or top nav with Solid Background (0A0A0A) and 1px hard bottom/right border.

badges.style: bg-surface-elevated border border-border text-xs uppercase tracking-widest px-2 py-1 rounded-sm

role_selection.layout: Full screen cinematic background image with black overlay (bg-black/60). Large typography, high-contrast action buttons for Owner, Staff, Member.

owner_dashboard.layout: Dense 'Control Room' grid. Top row: KPI summary cards (col-span-1). Middle row: Revenue/Attendance Charts (col-span-2 or 3). Bottom: Quick actions & alerts.

staff_dashboard.layout: Action-oriented. Massive 'Scan QR' primary button taking up significant real-estate. Fast search input for manual check-ins.

member_dashboard.layout: Progress-oriented. Highlight current plan status, active streak, and upcoming classes with high-visibility neon accents.

qr_scanner.ui: Camera view with a precise, technical targeting reticle overlay (4 corners in Electric Blaze). Minimal UI overlay to focus on scanning.

motion.loaders: Technical spinners or minimal progress bars (Electric Blaze). Avoid bouncy/playful loading animations.

media.guidelines: Overlay images with bg-black/60 or gradient to ensure text contrast. Use grayscale images with high contrast, let the UI colors (red/blue) pop against them.

hero_onboarding.description: Powerful female athlete in front of neon lights. Use for login/registration/role selection screens.

secondary_hero.description: Muscular man using heavy ropes. Use for member dashboard banner or fitness motivation sections.

avatar_placeholder.description: Strong man lifting weights. Use as a placeholder for trainer or premium member avatars.

texture_background.description: Close-up of a textured black surface. Use with low opacity (10-15%) over #0A0A0A to add grit to empty states or card backgrounds.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for body text, 3:1 for large text. Use pure white against #0A0A0A or #121212.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactable elements must have an explicit focus ring: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:outline-none.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='role-select-owner-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'react-native-safe-area-context' for proper padding on mobile devices.
Since this is an Expo React Native app, adapt Tailwind classes via NativeWind or equivalent, mapping CSS variables to StyleSheet.
Do NOT use pure white backgrounds anywhere. The theme is strictly dark mode (Performance Pro).
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media placeholders.
All forms/inputs should have large tap targets (minimum 44x44px) for mobile usability.
Implement charts (for Owner/Admin Dashboards) using a React Native compatible library (e.g., react-native-chart-kit or victory-native) applying the brand colors.
